description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events for ros2-development and ros2-master branches. The workflow should have read-all permissions and a single job called build that runs on a matrix of ROS distributions and operating systems. The job should set up a ROS2 workspace, check copyright and line-endings, build ROS2, checkout the librealsense repository, build the RealSense SDK and ROS2 wrapper from source, install required packages, and run tests.
